summary: Frontend-only testing of the ORACLE/TEMPLO radical redesign. All 18 review criteria verified on the live preview URL. Hero section, radial KPI dashboard, roman-numeral step heads, custom firm 2x card with dashed gold border, difficulty flames, IGNITE ceremonial button, language toggle, compare rack, CSV modal, exports — everything works end-to-end with zero JS console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is >1700 lines and now hosts Sigil, OrnateDivider, HeroSection, CompareRack, CsvModal, ResultsDashboard, AccountEditor etc. Consider extracting each into /src/components/ to ease future maintenance (not blocking)
html-to-image emits a CORS warning when reading Google Fonts CSS rules during PNG export. Export still works. Could be silenced by passing fontEmbedCSS or skipFonts:true
context_for_next_testing_agent: The ORACLE redesign is stable. All data-testids from the problem statement are wired correctly. KPI ids on the radial dashboard are: kpi-ppass (center), kpi-meanpass, kpi-fourth (dynamic: P·TIMEOUT / P·DLL / P·FAIL depending on plan), kpi-pdd, kpi-br95, kpi-p90pass, kpi-ev (7 cells total — not 8 as the review text said; the review list also enumerated 7 so this is consistent). Tooltip testids tip-dd_type / tip-floor_lock / tip-consistency / tip-dll / tip-phases / tip-ev / tip-bankroll / tip-break_even render conditionally (inside the 'alter laws' panel or inside results detail rows) — they worked in iteration 2 once those panels are opened.

passed: Hero renders: sigil SVG inside [data-testid=oracle-hero], Cinzel 'PROP · FORGE' title, Cormorant italic quote, ornate divider, meta line '21 chambers · 74 plans · client-side rite'
Top rail sticky with PROP · FORGE · monte carlo oracle brand, lang toggle (lang-es/lang-en) and help button persistent
Welcome block open by default, closes via btn-welcome-close, reopens via btn-show-help
Language toggle ES↔EN switches hero tagline, quote, step titles, button labels and KPI labels — IGNITE switches between 'INVOKE THE ORACLE' and 'INVOCAR EL ORÁCULO'
firm-custom card span ~615px wide (2x regular cards ~197px), dashed gold border visible, positioned first in grid
Regular firm cards (e.g. firm-apex_eod, firm-topstep) expose firm-{id}-difficulty with ✦ flame symbols (verified ✦✦✦ on apex_eod)
Clicking firm-apex_eod reveals Step 2 with plan-grid and 5 plan-* cards
Selecting plan reveals account-summary block + Step 3 left panel + results area
btn-run clicked -> oracle-revelation radial layout renders with kpi-ppass in center circle
All 7 KPI cells populated with numeric values: kpi-ppass 53.20%, kpi-meanpass 13d, kpi-fourth (P·TIMEOUT 11.81%), kpi-pdd 34.99%, kpi-br95 $879, kpi-p90pass 24d, kpi-ev +$499
Recharts histograms render: chart-dist, chart-pass-hist, chart-fail-hist
stats-row ledger present with 6 ledger entries
firm-custom -> custom-landing panel opens with AccountEditor
Compare rack: btn-add-compare adds plan, multiple slots (compare-slot-0..n) render, btn-run-all triggers MC and compare-results renders with btn-compare-png/json
CSV modal: btn-open-csv opens csv-modal, btn-csv-sample loads sample, detected + calibrated stats render, btn-csv-apply visible, btn-csv-close closes
Export PNG (btn-export-png) and Export JSON (btn-export-json) buttons present and functional
Roman numeral step headings visible (PRIMVS · I, SECVNDVS · II, TERTIVS · III)
No JavaScript console errors captured during full flow (firm->plan->ignite->compare->csv->lang-toggle)
not_fully_exercised_this_run_but_previou: Tooltips tip-dd_type, tip-floor_lock, tip-consistency, tip-dll, tip-phases, tip-ev, tip-bankroll, tip-break_even render only after opening 'alter laws' or custom mode / drilling into results; visible tips this run: tip-mae, tip-wr, tip-mu_sigma, tip-spike (4/12). Iteration 2 previously verified the remaining ones under their gating conditions.
